how_verified: By USE against the resident chat-4b (live at http://127.0.0.1:8000/v1, cyankiwi/Qwen3.5-4B-AWQ-4bit). /tmp/verify_option_panel.py (harness mirrors tests/reduce_acceptance.py: FsStore + RoleRegistry().discover([roles]) + run_items + run_reduce(mode='role')): (1) BOTH roles discovered + can_fire; develop_option op=generate, mode_scope={'panel'}, input_addresses=('utterance',); score_options op=generate, NO mode_scope, input_addresses=('notes',); neither declares resolve/approve/dispatch/verb. (2) MAP: run_items(develop_option, [{lens:'mvp-first',...},{lens:'risk-first',...}], max_tokens=512) -> 2 approaches resolved, 0 failed; every DevelopOptionOut field (lens/approach/buys/costs/touches/risk) present, non-empty, lens echoed correctly. (3) REDUCE: run_reduce(mapped.addresses, mode='role', role=score_options, max_tokens=768) -> ScoreOptionsOut with scored=[{lens,score(0..1),why}x2], a recommendation, and grafts (it grafted risk-first's fail-loud net onto the mvp-first lead). detail={n_units:2, role:'score_options'}. FLOOR: tests/cognition_governance_acceptance.py = 42/42 PASS (resolve/dispatch floor unforgeable from the cognition layer, roles emit non-consequential effects only). REGRESSION: tests/run_items_acceptance.py 32/32, tests/reduce_acceptance.py 28/28, tests/cast_beyond_listening_acceptance.py 9/9 all PASS (no existing caller broken; build is additive). EXPECTED RED CONFIRMED: tests/roles_acceptance.py reds ONLY at line 174 with 'drift: [develop_option, score_options]' (the two new roles un-reflected in roles/AGENTS.md, which this lane cannot edit); every check BEFORE it passes (lens-cast, mode-scope, C2.5, floor-verb) -- nothing earlier fails.
needs_tim: None for this lane. Two structural follow-ons (NOT blockers): (a) the next beat must reflect develop_option + score_options in roles/AGENTS.md to clear the roles_acceptance drift (intentionally out of this lane's scope -- file-disjoint). (b) To make the option-panel a one-call SAVED CASCADE per COMPOSITIONS ⑧ (save_cascade({name:'option-panel', steps:[{op:'generate',role:'develop_option',kind:'items'},{op:'reduce',role:'score_options',reduce_mode:'role'}]})), the cascade-runner's multi-variable prompt substitution (SYSTEM-GAPS G3) would let the per-lens {lens,question,constraints} units be templated -- today the panel is driven via run_items+run_reduce directly (proven), which is the working path until G3 lands.
notes: FILE-DISJOINT honored: only the two NEW role files touched. Did NOT edit mcp_face/server.py (other lane), runtime/cognition.py|suite.py|roles.py (read-only for the reuse seam), or roles/AGENTS.md (next beat). The ONE deliberate shape difference: score_options' output is richer than reduce_synth's flat {summary} -- it uses a nested ScoredOption sub-model + list[ScoredOption] (the same nested-sub-model pattern as register_element.py's HowTo), with score:float 0..1 (mirroring register_element.confidence:float). LENS set (COMPOSITIONS ⑧ exact): mvp-first, risk-first, reuse-first, framework-first, radical-recompose. No GPU window needed (composition ⑧ is the no-GPU panel; ran on the resident 4B).
